name: class-connect-root
description: Root script to run both backend and frontend

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && cd frontend && CI=false npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev" --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "magenta,blue"
